LOREMIND.done: Import done: {scenes} scene(s), {journals} journal(s), {tables} table(s), {actors} sheet(s).
LOREMIND.errorBadBundle: Invalid bundle: data.json or manifest.json not found.
LOREMIND.errorVersion: This bundle (format {version}) is newer than this module can read.
LOREMIND.notGM: Only the GM can import a bundle.
LOREMIND.pickPacks: Check the monsters to export (world actors and/or compendiums):
LOREMIND.monstersExported: {count} monster(s) exported. Import the .json in LoreMind (Bestiary).
LOREMIND.pickFallback: Picker unavailable — see console for ids, then api.exportMonsters([...]).
LOREMIND.noSampleActor: Select a token (sample actor) on the scene, or pass a UUID to api.exportSystemStructure(uuid).
LOREMIND.structureExported: Structure exported ({count} field(s)). Import the .json in LoreMind (Game system).
LOREMIND.deadRefFallback: Foundry reference not found for: {names} (actor from another world or missing compendium). Blank sheet(s) created instead — fill in the stats in Foundry, they will survive re-imports.
LOREMIND.actorsSkipped: No actor created for: {names} (see console F12 for details).
